{{Quote|The teeth. Are they…real?|[[Gaeriel Captison]]|<ref name="The Truce at Bakura">''[[The Truce at Bakura]]''</ref>}}
The '''Ketrann''' was a dangerous carnivore native to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alk'Lellish III]]. Described as "huge and snarling," the Ketrann had four long, white fangs. It fed on migrating herds of [[metarshi]], which it killed by leaping onto the metarshi's back and biting it once through the neck. [[Wilek Nereus]] personally killed one once and hung its teeth in his office on [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]].
